name: Noella Table Lamp - 28 Inch Height - TBL2003 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the NOELLA 28-inch black aluminum table lamp, a seamless blend of style and functionality. Crafted with precision, this lamp features a sleek black iron structure that adds an elegant touch to any room. The NOELLA lamps minimalist design effortlessly complements both modern and classic decor, making it a versatile addition to your home. Its 28-inch stature provides the ideal height for reading and creating a warm ambiance. The lamp's sturdy construction ensures it remains a staple in your living space. Transform your home with the NOELLA table lamp and enjoy a perfect balance of form and function. Its black finish and thoughtful design make it an essential element of style, offering you endless possibilities to enhance your interior.
